/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=10.13 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/juce_vst3_helper.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/VST3/juce_VST3ManifestHelper.mm.o" -o juce_vst3_helper  -framework Cocoa
